title: Bankruptcy proceedings commenced
description: Tokyo District Court commenced bankruptcy proceedings for MtGox Co., Ltd. on April 24, 2014.

title: Chapter 11 filing and collapse
description: FTX and affiliated debtors filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection on November 11, 2022.

title: Binance launched
description: Binance began operating as a centralized exchange.

title: CCAA protection and insolvency crisis
description: Quadriga sought and received CCAA protection on February 5, 2019 after the platform had shut down on January 28, 2019.

title: FinCEN penalties and U.S. enforcement action
description: FinCEN assessed penalties against BTC-e on July 26, 2017 as U.S. enforcement action escalated.

title: Uniswap protocol launched
description: Uniswap began operating as a decentralized exchange protocol.

title: SushiSwap protocol launched
description: SushiSwap began operating as a decentralized exchange protocol; launch date precision is currently limited to month level.

title: January 2019 exchange hack
description: Official liquidation materials describe a serious January 2019 hack that caused severe operational and reputational damage.
notes: The official source confirms the hack occurred in January 2019, but not the precise day.

title: Liquidators appointed and trading suspended
description: Cryptopia reached an operational end state associated with hack.

title: Operations wound down
description: Global exchange brand from the broader Bittrex lineage, later wound down after regulatory pressure and liquidation proceedings.

title: Operations ceased
description: Centralized exchange founded in 2018 that ceased CEX operations in May 2023 after deteriorating operating conditions and earlier disruption tied to an investigation.

title: Ownership changed through acquisition
description: Poloniex underwent an acquisition-related ownership change.
notes: Ownership transition only; exchange continued operating.

title: Vaultoro launched
description: Vaultoro began operating as a centralized exchange.

title: Platform migration underway
description: Official messaging described a temporary migration with customer assets stated to remain safe.
notes: Official site showed a migration/update notice in April 2026 with customer assets stated to remain safe. Launch date uses the May 2015 public launch reference for the trading service; company/about material also claims operations since 2014.

title: Cryptsy launched
description: Cryptsy began operating as a centralized exchange; launch date precision is currently limited to month level.

title: Insolvency crisis became definitive
description: Cryptsy reached its terminal operating state on the date used by HEI as the end marker.
notes: Later reporting places the exchange launch in May 2013. The operational end marker uses the January 2016 disclosure of hidden losses and withdrawal failure.

title: BitGrail launched
description: BitGrail began operating as a centralized exchange; launch date precision is currently limited to year level.

title: Operations ceased
description: BitGrail ceased operations after the crisis that ultimately ended the platform.
notes: Founding year is treated as 2017 from retrospective reporting. Death marker uses the Florence court order to cease operations on 2018-05-03; the primary collapse trigger remained the February 2018 Nano loss.

title: Operations ceased
description: Livecoin ceased operations after the crisis that ultimately ended the platform.
notes: Launch uses the specific April 2015 operating-since statement from the shutdown coverage. Some secondary profiles cite earlier founding dates; these are left in notes rather than used as the operational launch marker.

title: Operations wound down
description: CoinExchange.io reached its terminal operating state on the date used by HEI as the end marker.
notes: Public reporting indicates trading and deposits halted in October 2019, with withdrawals reportedly remaining available into December 2019.

title: Operations ceased
description: MapleChange ceased operations after the crisis that ultimately ended the platform.
notes: Public reporting conflicts on whether the terminal crisis is better characterized as a hack or an exit scam.

title: Cobinhood launched
description: Cobinhood began operating as a centralized exchange.

title: Operations wound down
description: Cobinhood reached its terminal operating state on the date used by HEI as the end marker.
notes: Reuters announced the platform launch in September 2017, but the live platform launch reference used here is 2017-12-18. Shutdown marker uses the 2020-01-10 customer notice.

title: Altsbit launched
description: Altsbit began operating as a centralized exchange; launch date precision is currently limited to month level.

title: Operations ceased
description: Altsbit ceased operations after the crisis that ultimately ended the platform.
notes: Public coverage indicates the venue was only a few months old by February 2020. The operational end marker uses the published refund deadline in May 2020.

title: Operations wound down
description: WEX reached its terminal operating state on the date used by HEI as the end marker.
notes: Launch uses the September 2017 rebrand/launch announcement. Death marker uses the late-November 2018 domain-loss point as an operational end marker; exact final shutdown timing remains contested.

title: Operations wound down
description: BX Thailand reached its terminal operating state on the date used by HEI as the end marker.

title: Operations interrupted
description: COSS went offline and then entered an acquisition/relaunch process, leaving long-term status ambiguous.
notes: COSS was taken offline on 2020-01-07 and later described acquisition negotiations and a relaunch plan. Because the record is too ambiguous for a clean dead-side classification, it is moved to inactive pending deeper verification.

title: Vircurex launched
description: Vircurex began operating as a centralized exchange; launch date precision is currently limited to month level.

title: Insolvency crisis became definitive
description: Vircurex reached its terminal operating state on the date used by HEI as the end marker.
notes: Launch uses repeated October 2011 references. Operational end marker uses the March 2014 withdrawal freeze and account-freeze period, which followed earlier hacks and a reserve crisis.

title: Operations ceased
description: CoinsMarkets ceased operations after the crisis that ultimately ended the platform.
notes: Launch remains approximate because strong primary founding records are still missing. Operational end marker uses the point when users widely reported trading and withdrawals disabled on 2018-01-05.

title: MintPal launched
description: MintPal began operating as a centralized exchange.

title: Operations ceased
description: MintPal ceased operations after the crisis that ultimately ended the platform.
notes: Launch uses a specific February 2014 launch reference. Death marker uses 2014-10-14 when Moolah announced MintPal had been shut down while preparing bankruptcy; later fallout continued after that date.

title: Vault of Satoshi launched
description: Vault of Satoshi began operating as a centralized exchange.

title: Operations wound down
description: Vault of Satoshi reached its terminal operating state on the date used by HEI as the end marker.
notes: Launch uses October 2013 reporting on the exchange going live. Closure date and reason come from the January 2015 shutdown announcement specifying a voluntary end rather than insolvency or theft.

title: Poloniex spins out from Circle
description: Poloniex leadership spun the exchange out of Circle into Polo Digital Assets, Ltd., continuing operations outside Circle.
notes: Ownership / corporate structure change; not a death-side terminal event.
